core_principles: High information density with clear visual hierarchy
Traffic-light logic (Green/Amber/Red) for instant cognitive recognition of risks
Strict grid adherence with 'Grid Borders' surface strategy
design_philosophy.emotional_tone: Futuristic, technical, tense yet controlled, professional

scale.h3_widget: text-lg sm:text-xl font-medium tracking-wide uppercase text-slate-400

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense, functional, max viewport usage)

layout_structure.main_canvas: col-span-1 md:col-span-2 lg:col-span-3 min-h-[60vh] relative border border-slate-800 bg-black overflow-hidden

surfaces_and_materials.cards: Flat solid background (#090A0F) with 1px precise border (#1E2330). No heavy shadows. 'Grid Borders' look.
surfaces_and_materials.kessler_banner: High contrast repeating linear gradient (black and red stripes), glowing text, sticky top.
surfaces_and_materials.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none), solid primary/accent color on hover, 1px border default.

dashboard_widgets.description: Metric cards for Satellite Count, Debris Count, Risk Level. Use large monospace typography for numbers.
dashboard_widgets.shadcn_overrides: Remove card rounded corners, make borders 1px solid slate-800, flat backgrounds.

simulation_canvas.description: HTML5 Canvas overlaid on top of a starfield background. Earth in center. Satellites drawn as sharp dots/triangles. Connection lines dynamically colored based on distance (Green > Yellow > Red).
simulation_canvas.pseudo_3d: Scale objects based on simulated Z-axis for depth.

controls_panel.description: Keyboard shortcut hints styled as physical keycaps (Kbd component). Speed slider, Add satellite toggle.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle background lightening, text color shift to pure white. Borders illuminate to accent color.
motion_and_interactions.kessler_trigger: Aggressive screen shake effect (CSS animation), banner drops down, ambient red glow overlay on canvas.

media_and_assets.icons_library: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) - Use Duotone or Bold weights for technical readability.

images.description: Starfield space background for parallax effect behind the canvas
High resolution Earth from space for the center of the orbital simulation

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against dark backgrounds passes WCAG AA (minimum 4.5:1).
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, sliders, canvas overlay) MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='speed-slider', data-testid='add-satellite-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Phosphor icons for technical UI elements. Run `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.
Implement the simulation canvas using standard HTML5 Canvas API inside a React component.
Use JetBrains Mono for all numeric counters and metrics to emphasize the Mission Control theme.
Implement the 'Kessler Syndrome Warning Banner' with an aggressive diagonal striped red/black CSS pattern.
Ensure the layout mimics a dense 'Control Room' grid without excessive white space.
The 3D depth can be simulated by adjusting the scale (radius) and opacity of objects as they traverse their orbital paths.
Include standard Shadcn components for sliders and toggles, overriding their classes to match the sharp, cardless aesthetic.
